description: Evaluation suite for the Wannabe Weekenders setlist builder tool and database constraints.

test_cases.name: Scenario 1: 90 Min Set, Yacht Rock Preference

validation_criteria.assertion: Verify that only songs marked as yacht rock or yacht rock adjacent are scheduled in the sets.
Verify that a warning is displayed showing that the total available music (63:30) is under the 90 min target.
Verify that 'Roll with the Changes' is scheduled as the closer of the final set (Set 2).
Verify that the break falls back to silent since only 2 acoustic songs are gig-ready and they overlap in performers.
Verify that each set has exactly one emergency cut, and it is located in the second half of the set (excluding openers/closers and segues).
Verify that 'Working for the Weekend' is scheduled as the opener of Set 1.
Verify that 'Roll with the Changes' is scheduled as the closer of Set 2.
Verify that the lead vocalist for each song is never listed as a backup vocalist.
Verify that gravelly songs are separated by at least 2 non-gravelly songs (or 1 if relaxed).

test_cases.name: Scenario 3: 3hr Set, David Out, Bar Gig

validation_criteria.assertion: Verify that David is not scheduled for any lead vocals, and Lauren covers his lead vocal parts.
Verify that the Constraints Satisfaction table shows 'Vocalist Balance' as satisfied, even though the detailed percentage breakdown is not published in the report.
Verify that the LEAD VOCALS BREAKDOWN section is NOT present in the output (it is computed internally but not published).

test_cases.name: Scenario 4: 3hr Set, Martin Out, Bar Gig

validation_criteria.assertion: Verify that 'Colors', 'The Chain', 'Landslide', and 'Blackbird' are excluded from the setlist and acoustic breaks (these require Martin's acoustic guitar). Verify that 'Ooh La La', 'Wish You Were Here', and 'Ventura Highway' are NOT cut — they survive without Martin (his part is omitted or covered).

Verify that Martin is not scheduled for any lead or backup vocals, David covers his lead vocal parts on American Girl and Hey Jealousy, and Lauren covers his lead vocal part on Born to Run (a per-song override in substitution_notes).
Verify that the LEAD VOCALS BREAKDOWN section is NOT present in the output (it is computed internally but not published).
Verify that whenever both 'Brown Eyed Girl' and 'Hey Jealousy' appear in any set or encore, Brown Eyed Girl comes first (per the order_rules canonical segue order).

Verify that acoustic breaks do not contain 'Landslide' or 'Blackbird' (cut songs), and do contain Martin-out-safe acoustic songs such as 'Wish You Were Here', 'Ventura Highway', 'Ooh La La', or 'All For You'.

test_cases.name: Scenario 6: 3hr Set, Martin Out, Acoustic Breaks + File Output

validation_criteria.assertion: Verify that acoustic breaks are populated (not silently fallen back to silent) by using surviving acoustic songs (Wish You Were Here, Ventura Highway, Ooh La La, All For You, Interstate Love Song).
Verify that a file named '2099-01-01 Test Venue Eval.md' is written to the setlists/ subdirectory.

Verify that a file named '2099-01-01 Test Venue Eval.txt' is written to the setlists/ subdirectory, containing plaintext arrow notation with 'No Martin' in the header and '->' separators between songs.
Verify that whenever Funkytown, Miss You, and Reeling in the Years all appear in the same set, they appear in that canonical order (per order_rules).

test_cases.name: Scenario 7: Full Band — Every Present Vocalist Must Lead At Least One Song

validation_criteria.assertion: Verify that Lauren, Jon, Martin, AND David each lead at least one song in the setlist (including encores). No vocalist present at the gig should have zero lead songs.
Verify that even if the vocalist inclusion constraint causes a 3-in-a-row streak for one vocalist, the setlist is still accepted as valid (vocalist inclusion takes priority).
